name: audio-forge
description: Audio generation platform — portfolio demo showcasing production patterns

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:lambda: npm run build -w apps/lambda && cd apps/lambda/dist && zip -r ../../../dist/lambda.zip . && cd ../../..
